ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-07-2019 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-10-2019 Continued To Aug-07-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Brillant appeared by telephone for Gloria Yee (Co-Executor).
Mark Schmuck for Martha Lee (Co-Executor).

Mr. Brillant stated that the box checked on the inventory and appraisal indicating that there is real property was a mistake. The Court instructed Mr. Brillant to file an amended inventory and appraisal. Mr. Brillant stated that there is a related trust matter, that the vast majority of the assets are in the trust and that there was $200,000.00 in the estate that heggstad could not fix. Mr. Brillant also stated that the estate is resolved, that they are in the process of doing paper work of the estate and the trust matter, that there is an issue of Ms. Lee's resignation and that they can then bring the estate to a close. Status on close of estate is continued to August 7, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Mr. Brillant that either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has to filed by that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
